info.title: SnapDog REST API
info.description: SnapDog Multi-zone synchronized audio controller API

get.description: Returns a list of all clients, including their volume, mute, connection status, and assigned zone.
Returns the number of configured clients in the system.
Returns the details of a single client specified by its 1-based index.
Returns whether the specified client is currently online and connected to the Snapcast server.
Returns the current active 10-band parametric Equalizer configuration for the specified client.

put.description: Updates the full 10-band parametric Equalizer configuration for the specified client.

400.description: Too many bands or validation error

post.description:
Overwrites the client's Equalizer settings with a predefined preset curve.
Supported values: "flat", `bass_boost`, "loudness", "vocals", `treble_boost`.

200.description: Updated full equalizer configuration from preset

put.description: Modifies a single filter band at the specified index within a client's Equalizer configuration.

parameters.name: band_index
parameters.description: 0-based index of the filter band to edit

get.description: Returns the icon identifier string configured for the specified client.
Returns the manual latency correction in milliseconds for the specified client.

put.description: Updates the manual latency correction (in milliseconds) for the specified client.

get.description: Returns whether the specified client is currently muted.

put.description: Mutes or unmutes the specified client.

post.description: Toggles the mute status of the specified client and returns the new status.

200.description: New client mute status after toggling

get.description: Returns the display name of the specified client.

put.description: Updates the friendly name of the specified client.

get.description: Returns the current active speaker correction configuration (PEQ bands) applied to the specified client.

put.description: Configures speaker correction for a client using either a named spinorama profile or custom EQ bands.

400.description: Invalid request payload (e.g., mutually exclusive options, validation failed)

404.description: Client or speaker profile not found

get.description: Returns the current volume level (0-100) of the specified client.

put.description: Updates the volume level of the specified client. Supports absolute or relative values (e.g. "+5", "-5", or "45").

get.description: Returns the index of the zone that the specified client is currently playing from.

put.description: Assigns the specified client to a target zone.

get.summary: Download the KNX ETS product database
get.description:
Returns the `.knxprod` for importing `SnapDog` into ETS. Served regardless of KNX
device mode so it can be fetched for commissioning at any time.

get.summary:
Product identity (version / order number / hardware revision) of the embedded
`.knxprod`.

get.description:
Returns whether the KNX device programming mode is currently active.
This endpoint is only available when the server is running in KNX device mode.

put.description:
Enable or disable the KNX device programming mode to allow ETS physical addressing.
This endpoint is only available when the server is running in KNX device mode.

get.description: Returns a list of all playlists available on the system, including local Radio stations and Subsonic playlists.
Returns details (name, track count) of a unified playlist by its index.
Returns the cover art image binary for the specified playlist.
Returns a list of all tracks in the specified playlist.

200.description: List of tracks in the playlist

get.description: Returns details of a specific track within a playlist.
Returns the cover art image binary for a specific track.
Returns a list of all speaker profiles available in the spinorama database.
Returns the parametric Equalizer configuration (PEQ bands) for the specified speaker profile name.

get.summary: Retrieve application and platform version details.

get.description: Returns a list of all zones, including volume, mute status, playback state, and presence settings.
Returns the number of configured zones in the system.
Returns the details of a single zone specified by its 1-based index.
Returns a list of 1-based client indexes currently assigned to the specified zone.

Returns the cover art image binary (JPEG/PNG) of the currently playing track in the zone.
Defaults to a placeholder icon when no cover art is loaded.
Returns the current active 10-band parametric Equalizer configuration for the specified zone.

put.description: Updates the full 10-band parametric Equalizer configuration for the specified zone.

400.description: Too many bands or validation error

post.description:
Overwrites the zone's Equalizer settings with a predefined preset curve.
Supported values: "flat", `bass_boost`, "loudness", "vocals", `treble_boost`.

200.description: Updated full equalizer configuration from preset

put.description: Modifies a single filter band at the specified index within a zone's Equalizer configuration.

parameters.name: band_index
parameters.description: 0-based index of the filter band to edit

get.description: Returns the emoji character configured for the specified zone.
Returns whether the specified zone is currently muted.

put.description: Mutes or unmutes all outputs assigned to the specified zone.

post.description: Toggles the mute status of the specified zone.

get.description: Returns the name of the specified zone.

post.description: Skips to the next track in the playlist for the specified zone.
Switches the zone to the next available unified playlist.
Pauses playback in the specified zone.
Resumes playback in the specified zone.
Switches the zone to a unified playlist index and starts playing at the specified track index.
Starts playback of the specified track index in the specified unified playlist.
Plays a specific Subsonic track directly using its unique upstream alphanumeric ID.
Starts playback of a specific track index within the active playlist.
Forces the zone to play a direct HTTP/HTTPS audio stream URL.

400.description: Invalid URL schema (must be http or https)

get.description: Returns the playback status string ("playing", "paused", "stopped").
Returns the index of the currently active unified playlist in the specified zone.

put.description:
Selects the specified unified playlist index. If the zone is already playing, playback switches
to the selected playlist; otherwise the playlist is loaded and can be started with transport play.

get.description: Returns the number of tracks currently in the active playlist.
Returns high-level details about the active playlist (name, current track index, total tracks).
Returns the display name of the currently active playlist in the zone.
Returns true if presence/motion is currently active in the zone.

put.description: Triggers presence/occupancy manually (true = presence active, false = presence cleared).

get.description: Returns whether presence detection is enabled for the specified zone.

put.description: Enables or disables the presence/motion detection system for the specified zone.

get.description: Returns the auto-off delay in seconds after presence is cleared.

put.description: Updates the auto-off timeout delay (in seconds) after presence is cleared.

get.description: Returns whether the auto-off timer is currently running (countdown to turn off playback).

200.description: True if auto-off countdown timer is active

post.description: Skips to the previous track in the playlist for the specified zone.
Switches the zone to the previous available unified playlist.

get.description: Returns the current playlist repeat mode for the specified zone.

put.description: Updates the playlist repeat mode ("off", "all", "one") for the specified zone.

post.description: Cycles the repeat mode to the next option (Off -> All -> One -> Off) for the specified zone.

get.description: Returns whether playlist shuffle mode is enabled in the specified zone.

put.description: Enables or disables playlist shuffle mode in the specified zone.

post.description: Toggles the playlist shuffle mode in the specified zone.
Stops playback and clears the active stream in the specified zone.

get.description: Returns the index of the currently active track in the playlist for the specified zone.
Returns the album title of the track currently playing in the specified zone.
Returns the artist name of the track currently playing in the specified zone.
Returns the total duration of the currently active track in milliseconds.
Returns detailed metadata (title, artist, album, duration, etc.) for the currently playing track in the zone.
Returns whether the specified zone is currently playing audio (true) or paused/stopped (false).

200.description: True if active track is playing

get.description: Returns the current playback position of the active track in milliseconds.

put.description: Seeks to a specific timestamp or offset in milliseconds. Exactly one field must be provided.

400.description: Invalid payload (both or neither field provided)

get.description: Returns the current playback progress as a fractional value between 0.0 and 1.0.

put.description: Seeks to a specific progress fraction (0.0 to 1.0) of the track.

get.description: Returns the title of the track currently playing in the specified zone.
Returns the current group volume level (0-100) of the specified zone.

put.description: Updates the volume level of the specified zone. Supports absolute or relative values (e.g. "+5", "-5", or "45").

ApplySpeakerRequest.description: Request body for applying a speaker correction.

oneOf.description: Custom EQ config. Mutually exclusive with `speaker`.

speaker.description: Speaker name (from spinorama). Mutually exclusive with `custom`.

gain.description: Gain in dB (positive = boost, negative = cut). Ignored for low/high pass.

q.description: Q factor controlling bandwidth. Higher values = narrower band.

type.description: Filter type (low shelf, high shelf, peaking, low pass, high pass).

EqConfig.description: Full EQ configuration for a zone.

bands.description: Ordered list of biquad filter bands applied in series.

enabled.description: Whether the EQ is active. When `false`, audio passes through unmodified.

preset.description: Name of the preset this config was loaded from, if any.

ErrorBody.description: Standard REST API error response body.

message.description: Detailed human-readable explanation of the error.

FilterType.description: Filter type for an EQ band.

oneOf.description: Stop playback and return to idle.
Seek to absolute position or by relative offset.

track.description: Track index within the playlist (0-based, default: 0).

PlaybackControl.description: Playback control command sent from client to server.

ProductInfo.description:
ETS product identity of the embedded `.knxprod`, shown next to the `WebUI` download so
an integrator can confirm it matches this device's firmware.

TrackMetadata.description: Full zone state pushed from server to client via custom message.

album_artist.description: Album artist (may differ from track artist).
